content: agent1: implementing idle_timeout/tick() feature in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. Will add idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking, and tick() method. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent1: done with idle_timeout/tick() feature. Changes to dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py: added idle_timeout_s param + _last_chunk_ts to __init__, refresh _last_chunk_ts on non-empty chunk in receive(), added new tick(now_ts=None) method between receive() and flush() that emits empty-chunk StreamResponse + resets state (field_start_queue, field_end_queue, stream_start, stream_end, cache_hit, _last_chunk_ts) unconditionally on timeout. If your debug logs want reset/emit hook points, tick() has clear reset block you can add logging around. Will submit patch shortly.
